description: The 2022 Nissan Kicks SR is the top-tier trim of this subcompact crossover, blending bold design, advanced safety features, and modern technology into a stylish and efficient package. Its ideal for urban drivers who want versatility, fuel efficiency, and a touch of sporty flair. Exterior Features: The Kicks SR stands out with a sporty and modern exterior, featuring unique design elements that differentiate it from lower trims. Key exterior highlights include: LED headlights with LED signature accents LED daytime running lights and fog lights Sporty dark chrome grille Roof-mounted rear spoiler Black-painted mirror caps with integrated turn signals Chrome exhaust finisher Body-color bumpers and door handles 17-inch alloy wheels with a distinctive design Available two-tone paint with contrasting roof color Interior Features: Inside, the Kicks SR offers a stylish, tech-forward cabin with premium touches and space for five passengers. Interior features include: Sport cloth seat trim with orange contrast stitching Leather-wrapped steering wheel and shift knob Heated front seats and heated steering wheel (optional package) 60/40 split-folding rear seat Automatic climate control Keyless entry with push-button start Cargo area cover and adjustable load floor Ample headroom and legroom, especially for a subcompact SUV Technology and Infotainment: The SR trim is loaded with Nissans latest connectivity and infotainment technologies. Key features include: 8-inch NissanConnect touchscreen display Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration Wi-Fi hotspot capability SiriusXM satellite radio Bose Personal Plus audio system with 8 speakers, including speakers in the drivers headrest USB-A and USB-C ports for front and rear passengers Bluetooth hands-free phone and streaming audio 7-inch Advanced Drive-Assist Display in the instrument cluster Performance and Efficiency: The 2022 Kicks SR is powered by a fuel-efficient engine, delivering a comfortable ride suited for city driving and commuting. Its front-wheel drive and built for agility. 1.6L DOHC 16-valve 4-cylinder engine 122 horsepower and 114 lb-ft of torque Xtronic Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT) Front-wheel drive only Fuel economy: approximately 31 MPG city / 36 MPG highway Electric power steering and tight turning radius for urban maneuverability Safety and Driver Assistance: The Kicks SR comes standard with Nissan Safety Shield® 360, offering a full suite of active safety technologies. Key features include: Automatic Emergency Braking with Pedestrian Detection Lane Departure Warning Blind Spot Warning Rear Cross Traffic Alert Rear Automatic Braking High Beam Assist Intelligent Around View® Monitor (360-degree camera system) Intelligent Cruise Control (available) Driver Attention Alert and Rear Door Alert Utility and Cargo Space: Despite its compact size, the Kicks offers a surprising amount of cargo space and flexible storage options for daily use or road trips. Up to 25.3 cubic feet of cargo space behind the rear seats Expands to 32.3 cubic feet with rear seats folded Low cargo floor for easy loading Multiple storage compartments and bottle holders Overall: The 2022 Nissan Kicks SR is a well-rounded subcompact crossover that emphasizes value, efficiency, and style. With sporty design elements, top-level tech, and standard safety features, its perfect for younger drivers, city commuters, or anyone seeking an affordable SUV with a premium feel. description: The 2022 Honda Civic Sport Touring Hatchback is the top-tier trim in the Civic Hatchback lineup, offering a perfect blend of performance, practicality, technology, and premium features. Designed with both driving enthusiasts and everyday commuters in mind, it delivers an upscale experience in a sporty, versatile package. Exterior Design The Civic Sport Touring Hatchback features a sleek, modern exterior with dynamic body lines and a low, wide stance. The front end is highlighted by a bold grille, LED headlights with auto-on/off functionality, and LED fog lights. 18-inch alloy wheels in a gloss black finish, integrated turn signals in the side mirrors, and dual center-mounted exhaust outlets add a sporty and refined touch. The hatchback design offers not only a distinctive look but also increased versatility for cargo and daily use. Powertrain and Performance Under the hood, the Sport Touring trim is powered by a 1.5-liter turbocharged inline-4 engine producing 180 horsepower and 177 lb-ft of torque (162 lb-ft with CVT). This model comes with a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT), delivering smooth and efficient performance. The Civic offers responsive steering, composed handling, and a comfortable ride, making it equally capable in city traffic and on winding roads. For added efficiency, the Civic achieves competitive fuel economy without sacrificing driving fun. Interior Comfort and Features Inside, the 2022 Civic Sport Touring impresses with its upscale materials, thoughtful layout, and spacious cabin. The seats are upholstered in leather, with heated front seats and a power-adjustable drivers seat. A leather-wrapped steering wheel and shift knob add to the premium feel, while dual-zone automatic climate control ensures comfort for both driver and passenger. The cabin is quiet and refined, with ample legroom for front and rear occupants. Technology and Connectivity This top-tier trim comes equipped with a 9-inch touchscreen infotainment system, offering wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, built-in navigation, and a premium 12-speaker Bose audio system. Additional tech features include wireless smartphone charging, USB ports in both the front and rear, and a customizable 10.2-inch digital instrument cluster. The Honda Smart Key system with remote start and walk-away auto lock adds convenience to your daily routine. Safety and Driver Assistance The 2022 Civic Sport Touring includes Honda Sensing®, a comprehensive suite of advanced safety and driver-assistance technologies. Standard features include adaptive cruise control with low-speed follow, lane keeping assist, road departure mitigation, forward collision warning with collision mitigation braking, and traffic sign recognition. This trim also adds front and rear parking sensors, low-speed braking control, and a multi-angle rearview camera for enhanced visibility and awareness. Cargo and Utility Thanks to its hatchback design, the Civic Sport Touring offers generous cargo space. Behind the rear seats, it provides 24.5 cubic feet of storage, expanding significantly when the 60/40 split rear seats are folded down. The low cargo floor and wide opening make it easy to load larger items, while the retractable cargo cover keeps valuables out of sight. Summary The 2022 Honda Civic Sport Touring Hatchback CVT combines sport-inspired styling, turbocharged performance, and premium technology in a highly practical and stylish body. Its an ideal choice for drivers seeking an elevated compact car experience with advanced features and everyday usability. description: The 2023 Toyota Camry XSE 4-Door Sedan is a refined and performance-oriented version of Toyotas popular midsize sedan. Designed to blend sportiness with sophistication, the XSE trim offers bold styling, a well-equipped interior, and advanced technology, making it an excellent choice for drivers seeking both excitement and everyday practicality. Exterior Design The Camry XSE stands out with a striking and athletic exterior. It features a gloss-black front grille with a sport mesh insert, a sleek low-profile design, and sharp body lines that convey movement even when the vehicle is stationary. 19-inch black machined-finish alloy wheels, dual exhaust with quad chrome tips, and a color-keyed rear spoiler emphasize the cars sporty character. LED headlights with black accents and integrated daytime running lights give the front fascia a bold, premium look. Interior & Comfort Inside, the Camry XSE offers a modern and upscale cabin with seating for five. It comes with leather-trimmed, heated front seats that are both stylish and supportive. The drivers seat features 8-way power adjustment with lumbar support, and the passengers seat includes 6-way power adjustment. The dual-zone automatic climate control ensures comfort for both front occupants. Red contrast stitching, aluminum trim, and ambient interior lighting add a touch of luxury and sportiness throughout the cabin. Technology & Infotainment The Camry XSE is equipped with a standard 9-inch touchscreen display as part of the Toyota Audio Multimedia system. It includes wireless Apple CarPlay® and Android Auto integration, Bluetooth® connectivity, Amazon Alexa compatibility, and SiriusXM® with a free trial period. The sound system includes 6 speakers, with an optional upgrade to a premium JBL® audio system. A 7-inch color Multi-Information Display in the instrument cluster provides essential driving information clearly and conveniently. Performance & Handling Under the hood, the 2023 Camry XSE comes standard with a 2.5-liter Dynamic Force 4-cylinder engine that delivers 206 horsepower and 186 lb-ft of torque. An 8-speed automatic transmission ensures smooth acceleration and responsive gear shifts. For those seeking more power, the XSE is also available with a 3.5-liter V6 engine producing 301 horsepower. The sport-tuned suspension, low center of gravity, and responsive steering deliver a balanced and engaging driving experience, whether on city streets or winding roads. Safety Features Toyota prioritizes safety with the Camry XSE, which comes standard with Toyota Safety Sense 2.5+. This advanced suite of safety technologies includes: Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection Lane Departure Alert with Steering Assist Full-Speed Range Dynamic Radar Cruise Control Lane Tracing Assist Road Sign Assist Automatic High Beams Additional standard safety features include a blind spot monitor with rear cross-traffic alert, a backup camera with dynamic gridlines, 10 airbags, and Toyotas Star Safety System, which includes Vehicle Stability Control (VSC), Traction Control (TRAC), and more. Fuel Efficiency Despite its sporty performance, the 2023 Camry XSE maintains impressive fuel economy, especially with the 4-cylinder engine. Its aerodynamic design and efficient powertrain make it a practical choice for both urban commuting and highway driving. Overall Impression The 2023 Toyota Camry XSE 4-Door Sedan is a standout in the midsize sedan segment, combining bold design, advanced technology, sporty handling, and comprehensive safety features. Whether you value performance, comfort, or connectivity, the Camry XSE delivers a driving experience that feels premium without sacrificing Toyotas hallmark reliability. description: The 2023 Honda Civic Sport 4-Door Sedan is a sleek and modern compact car that blends sporty styling with everyday practicality. Known for its reliability and efficiency, this version of the Civic carries forward Hondas legacy of building well-rounded vehicles with a strong focus on performance, design, and advanced technology. Exterior Design The Civic Sport boasts an aggressive yet refined exterior. It features sharp body lines, a low and wide stance, and a gloss-black front grille that adds a sporty edge. The LED headlights with auto-on/off functionality provide excellent visibility and a premium look. 18-inch black alloy wheels, body-colored door handles, and chrome exhaust finishers enhance its athletic profile. The overall design is both aerodynamic and eye-catching. Interior & Comfort Inside, the Civic Sport offers a clean and driver-focused cabin. The interior is trimmed with high-quality materials, including sporty accents and textured finishes. It comfortably seats five passengers and provides ample legroom and headroom for both front and rear occupants. The cloth upholstery is durable and stylish, while the leather-wrapped steering wheel and shift knob add a touch of refinement. A fold-down rear seatback adds cargo flexibility to the spacious trunk. Technology & Infotainment The vehicle comes equipped with a 7-inch touchscreen infotainment system that supports Apple CarPlay® and Android Auto integration, allowing for seamless connectivity with your smartphone. Bluetooth® HandsFreeLink® and streaming audio come standard, along with a 180-watt audio system with 8 speakers that delivers clear and balanced sound throughout the cabin. Performance & Handling Under the hood, the Civic Sport is powered by a 2.0-liter DOHC i-VTEC® 4-cylinder engine that produces 158 horsepower and 138 lb-ft of torque. It is paired with a Continuously Variable Transmission (CVT) for smooth acceleration and enhanced fuel efficiency. The MacPherson strut front suspension and multi-link rear suspension provide confident handling and a comfortable ride. Steering is precise, and the Sport trim offers a slightly firmer suspension tuning for a more engaging driving experience. Safety Features Safety is a top priority in the 2023 Civic. Standard Honda Sensing® technology includes a suite of advanced safety and driver-assist features such as: Collision Mitigation Braking System (CMBS) Road Departure Mitigation System (RDM) Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) with Low-Speed Follow Lane Keeping Assist System (LKAS) Forward Collision Warning (FCW) Lane Departure Warning (LDW) Additionally, it features a multi-angle rearview camera, Vehicle Stability Assist (VSA®) with traction control, and advanced airbag systems for comprehensive protection. Fuel Efficiency The 2023 Civic Sport is designed to deliver excellent fuel economy, making it a practical choice for daily commuting and long drives alike. It achieves competitive mileage ratings thanks to its efficient powertrain and lightweight design. Overall Impression The 2023 Honda Civic Sport 4-Door Sedan is a balanced and stylish compact car that offers a sporty aesthetic, modern tech, strong safety features, and a responsive drive. Its an ideal choice for drivers seeking a reliable, fuel-efficient sedan that doesnt compromise on looks or performance. description: Discover the exceptional 2023 Hyundai Elantra Hybrid Blue, a remarkable blend of efficiency, technology, and style. This meticulously maintained vehicle, with just 14,541 miles, is the perfect companion for your daily commute or weekend adventures.  Boasting an impressive array of features, the Elantra Hybrid Blue is designed to elevate your driving experience. Key highlights include:   Option Group 01  6 Speakers  AM/FM radio: SiriusXM  Radio: AM/FM/HD/SiriusXM Display Audio  Air Conditioning  Automatic temperature control  Front dual zone A/C  Rear window defroster  Power steering  Power windows  Remote keyless entry  Steering wheel mounted audio controls  Speed-sensing steering  Traction control  The Elantra Hybrid Blue's exceptional fuel efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 53 city MPG and 56 highway MPG, makes it an ideal choice for those seeking to minimize their environmental impact and save on fuel costs. Powered by a responsive I4 engine and a 6-Speed Dual Clutch transmission, this vehicle delivers a smooth and engaging driving experience.  Stepping inside, you'll be greeted by a well-appointed interior that prioritizes both comfort and convenience. The heated front bucket seats, along with the front center armrest, provide a luxurious and relaxing ride, while the Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration keep you connected and entertained on the go.  Safety is also a top priority in the Elantra Hybrid Blue, with features like dual front impact airbags, dual front side impact airbags, and electronic stability control ensuring your peace of mind behind the wheel. The Exterior Parking Camera Rear and Auto High-beam Headlights further enhance your visibility and driving confidence.  With its sleek Black exterior and well-appointed interior, the 2023 Hyundai Elantra Hybrid Blue is a testament to Hyundai's commitment to excellence. Experience the perfect balance of efficiency, technology, and style by scheduling a test drive today. [!@@ NL @@!]OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:[!@@ NL @@!][!@@ NL @@!][!@@ NL @@!][!@@ NL @@!]Convenience GPS linked cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until GPS linked cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and the system uses GPS navigation data to maintain that speed without driver intervention - including slowing down for curves and anticipating hills. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; GPS linked cruise control.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety.  Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision. Hands-on cruise control. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful. Cruise control only managed speed, but not distance or safety. Now, with hands-on cruise control, simply set your desired speed and let sensor technology maintain a safe distance between you and surrounding vehicles. It slows you down; speeds you up and even keeps you in your own lane. Meet your ultimate co-pilot with hands-on cruise control.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. This 2026 Honda CR-V EX-L is a testament to the brand's commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident. Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead.  *  Pedestrian impact prevention - An extra step toward safety. Pedestrians don't always stop, look, and listen, but with Pedestrian Impact Prevention, your vehicle is equipped to better see them and avoid them. This system constantly monitors the road ahead to identify and track pedestrians. It projects that image to an interior display screen, AND should an impact become likely, Pedestrian impact prevention takes steps to avoid a collision.  *  Rear camera - Watching your back! The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe.=== Technology and Telematics ===  *  Apple CarPlay/Android Auto smart device wireless mirroring  *  Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Whether you're commuting, running errands, or embarking on a weekend adventure, the 2024 Nissan Rogue SV is the perfect companion. description: Bentley Rancho Mirage is delighted to present this stunning Certified Pre-Owned 2025 Bentley Continental GT First Edition in a striking Tourmaline Green exterior, perfectly paired with a refined Linen interior. This luxurious open-top grand tourer combines exceptional craftsmanship with state-of-the-art performance, creating a driving experience unlike any other.    Under the hood, this 2025 Bentley Continental GT First Edition is powered by a commanding 4.0L Twin-Turbo Ultra Performance V8 Hybrid engine, delivering an impressive blend of power and efficiency. This engine generates a robust 542 horsepower and 568 lb-ft of torque, seamlessly managed by an advanced 8-Speed Dual-Clutch Transmission. With its AWD drivetrain, this convertible offers unparalleled handling, ensuring smooth and confident performance in any driving condition.    Key Features & Options:     First Edition Specification: A highly exclusive package that enhances luxury, style, and technology, ensuring this Bentley is truly one-of-a-kind.     Heated Duo-Tone Steering Wheel: A perfect fusion of comfort and elegance, designed to provide warmth and luxury during cooler drives.     Self-Leveling Wheel Badge by Mulliner: A signature touch from Mulliner, ensuring the Bentley emblem remains perfectly upright while in motion.     Panoramic Glass Roof: Enhancing the open-air experience with expansive views and an added sense of space.     Contrast Binding to Carpet Overmats: A fine detail that showcases Bentley's commitment to precision and craftsmanship.     Bright Chrome Diamond Knurling: Adding a touch of brilliance to the interior with intricate detailing.     Chrome Pinstripe Fascia & Door Waistrails: An elegant and refined addition that enhances the cabins aesthetics.     Contrast Stitching: A beautifully crafted detail that accentuates the luxurious leather upholstery.     Leather Specification: Premium leather throughout the cabin, delivering the ultimate in comfort and sophistication.     Standard Brakes with Black Calipers: Providing powerful stopping performance while maintaining a sleek and understated appearance.     22" Gray and Bright Machined Wheels: A striking design that complements the bold exterior and enhances road presence.     Mulliner Range Solid and Metallic Paint: A premium paint finish from Bentleys renowned Mulliner customization division.     Contrast Seatbelts by Mulliner: A final touch of bespoke craftsmanship, adding subtle contrast to the luxurious interior.    The 2025 Bentley Continental GTC First Edition represents the pinnacle of open-air grand touring, combining power, luxury, and sophistication in a way that only Bentley can. Whether cruising along scenic coastlines or navigating the city streets, this convertible offers an unrivaled experience of elegance and exhilaration.    Bentley Rancho Mirage is a member of the indiGO Auto Group. Our dealership features a beautiful redesigned showroom, fully staffed factory-certified service center, parts department, finance department, detail department, and accessories boutique. Allow us to also help arrange transportation of your new car directly to your home anywhere in the world. Trade-in proposals are always welcome. If you like this vehicle and have questions, simply call, email, or drop by our location at 71387 HIGHWAY 111, RANCHO MIRAGE, CA 92270. We invite you to Activate Your Ownership with us today!

description: Move the Whole Crew. Own the Whole Day.  This 2026 Ford Transit T-350 XL 15-Passenger AWD is built for the people who run the schedule, not the other way around. Oxford White over durable Dark Palazzo Gray vinyl, its the kind of van that turns chaos into coordination. Think early pickups in Dundee, a clean run through Clinton, and a smooth arrival in Ypsilanti with everyone comfortable, everyone accounted for, and zero drama in the process.  Power comes from the 3.5L EcoBoost V6 paired with a 10-speed automatic, so it moves confidently even when youre carrying a full roster and their gear. The AWD setup brings the grip for real Midwest weather, and the limited-slip axle adds the kind of control you appreciate when roads get slick outside Monroe County, rough through Lenawee County, or unpredictable in Washtenaw County. Set the route on US-23, take the faster pace on I-94, or cut across US-12 when the day changes mid-drive and you need options.  This Transit is equipped like a true people-mover, not a bare-bones shuttle. The 15-passenger seating and long-arm power mirrors make it easy to manage size and visibility, while front and rear parking assist plus a rearview camera keep tight schools, busy churches, and crowded venues from turning into a headache. And because your day runs on connection, youve got Ford Co-Pilot360 Assist 2.0, SYNC 4 with a 12" touchscreen, and wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto to keep routes, calls, and coordination flowing without friction. Add front fog lamps and youre ready for those gray, low-visibility mornings that show up uninvited.  For the people doing the driving, its set up to stay comfortable and focused: A/C climate control, a 12" productivity screen, and a locking glove box keep the cockpit clean and organized. Out back, the dual batteries (70 amp-hour) and extra heavy-duty alternator support the kind of nonstop use that fleet life demands, while the trailer brake controller gives you the backbone to pull what the day requires without hesitation.  And because life doesnt stop at the border, this Transit is ready for tri-state motion. Run down I-75 into Ohio, pass through Sylvania, swing by Perrysburg, and finish in Maumee with the same smooth rhythm you had leaving Michigan. Through Lucas County, Wood County, and Fulton County, it keeps the ride steady and the day organized, especially when youre bouncing between stops on US-20, US-24, and OH-2.  Indiana routes feel just as natural. Slide along I-69, roll through Fort Wayne, pass New Haven, and end up in Angola with everyone still comfortable and the schedule still intact. In Allen County, DeKalb County, and Steuben County, roads like US-30, US-24, and IN-3 keep the whole region connected, and this Transit keeps your operation moving like its supposed to. description: The 2016 Infiniti QX50 is a luxury compact crossover that offers a balance of powerful performance, refined styling, and premium comfort. With an updated design and increased interior space compared to the previous model year, the 2016 QX50 delivers an exceptional driving experience for those seeking both sportiness and sophistication.  Engine   Powertrain: 3.7L V6 engine   Horsepower: 325 hp @ 7,000 rpm   Torque: 267 lb-ft @ 5,200 rpm   Transmission: 7-speed automatic with manual shift mode   Drivetrain: Rear-wheel drive (RWD) standard, available Intelligent All-Wheel Drive (AWD)   Fuel Economy: EPA-estimated 17 mpg city / 24 mpg highway (RWD)  The 2016 QX50 provides smooth power delivery and responsive acceleration, making it one of the most dynamic performers in its class.  Technology   7-inch color display with Infiniti Controller for navigation, audio, and vehicle settings   Bluetooth Hands-Free Phone System and audio streaming   RearView Monitor for enhanced parking and reversing with 360 view and front and rear parking sensors    Infiniti Navigation System with 3D graphics, lane guidance, and voice recognition   Standard USB/iPod integration and satellite radio compatibility   Available Bose 11-speaker premium audio system for high-quality sound   Intelligent Key with push-button start for convenience  Exterior   Redesigned for 2016 with a more aggressive stance and a longer wheelbase (up by 3.2 inches) for improved proportions and interior room   Lighting: Bi-Xenon HID headlights, LED daytime running lights, and LED taillights   Standard 18-inch alloy wheels, with available 19-inch wheels on higher trims   Power-adjustable, heated side mirrors   Distinctive double-arch grille with chrome accents   Power-sliding tinted glass moonroof with one-touch open/close  Interior   Luxuriously appointed cabin with leather seating surfaces and high-quality materials throughout   Spacious interior with improved rear legroom thanks to the longer wheelbase   Heated, power-adjustable front seats with memory settings for the driver   Dual-zone automatic climate control for personalized comfort   Maple wood or aluminum interior trim options for a sophisticated look   Fold-flat rear seats for flexible cargo options (18.6 cubic feet with seats up)   Available features include a heated steering wheel, ventilated front seats, and an advanced lumbar support system  Disclaimer This description is for informational purposes only and may not reflect the exact condition, features, or specifications of the specific vehicle available. description: Our 2018 Jeep Compass Sport 4X4 in Granite Crystal Metallic is stylish, smart and ready for all your adventures. Powered by an innovative 2.4 Liter Tigershark 4 Cylinder offering 180hp paired with a 9 Speed Automatic transmission for consistently refined performance. This trail-friendly Four Wheel Drive SUV also achieves nearly 30mpg on the highway and is impressively agile in the city. And check out the classic exterior styling that turns heads with an aggressive grille, quad halogen headlights, and heated power mirrors.   Chart your course for adventure in our Sport cabin that's equipped with comfortable cloth seats, an easy-to-fold second row, a multifunction steering wheel, air conditioning, and Uconnect 3 technology with a 5-inch touchscreen, integrated voice command, Bluetooth, and a six-speaker sound system. Multiple 12-volt power outlets and USB ports plus a full-length floor console add practical benefits you'll definitely appreciate. description: Sting-Gray Clearcoat 2020 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Rubicon 4WD 6-Speed Manual 3.6L V6 24V VVT 240 Amp Alternator, 7 & 4 Pin Wiring Harness, 700 Amp Maintenance Free Battery, Alloy wheels, Auxiliary Switches, Blind Spot & Cross Path Detection, Class II Receiver Hitch, Daytime Running Lamps LED Accents, Front LED Fog Lamps, GPS Navigation, LED Lighting Group, LED Reflector Headlamps, LED Taillamps, ParkSense Rear Park Assist System, Premium Cloth Low-Back Bucket Seats, Quick Order Package 23R, Radio: Uconnect 4C Nav w/8.4" Display, Safety Group, Split folding rear seat, Steel Bumper Group, Steel Front Bumper, Steel Rear Bumper, Trailer Tow & HD Electrical Group, Wheels: 17" x 7.5" Black w/Machined Lip The 2020 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Rubicon 3.6L is a highly capable off-road SUV known for its rugged design, advanced off-road features, and iconic style. Here are the key highlights and features of this model:  **Engine & Performance:** - 3.6-liter V6 Pentastar engine producing 285 horsepower and 260 lb-ft of torque. - Smooth-shifting 6-speed manual transmission as standard; 8-speed automatic transmission available. - Four-wheel drive system with Command-Trac part-time transfer case for enhanced off-road capability. - Heavy-duty Dana 44 axles with locking differentials. - Electronic sway bar disconnect for increased articulation during off-road adventures. - Hill Descent Control and Selec-Speed Control for challenging terrains.  **Exterior & Design:** - Classic Jeep design with iconic seven-slot grille and round headlights. - Wide fender flares and high ground clearance. - Removable doors and fold-down windshield for open-air driving. - Rubicon-specific decals and accents. - 17-inch aluminum wheels with all-terrain tires.  **Interior & Comfort:** - Durable cloth or optional leather-trimmed seats. - 60/40 split-folding rear seats for versatile cargo space. - Uconnect 4 infotainment system with a 7-inch touchscreen. - Apple CarPlay and Android Auto connectivity. - Premium audio system available. - Manual air conditioning or optional automatic climate control.  **Off-Road & Utility Features:** - Rubicon package equipped with heavy-duty shocks, rock rails, and off-road tires. - Skid plates for underbody protection. - Trail-rated capability with off-road modes. - Tow hooks and a standard trailer hitch receiver. - Removable roof panels and freedom top options.  **Safety & Driver Assistance:** - Rearview camera. - Electronic stability control. - Anti-lock brakes. - Available blind-spot monitoring and rear cross-path detection.  **Additional Features:** - Fog lamps. - Keyless entry and start. - Optional remote start. - Heavy-duty off-road suspension.  The 2020 Jeep Wrangler Unlimited Rubicon 3.6L is designed for serious off-road enthusiasts who want rugged capability combined with classic Jeep styling and modern technology. description: 2021 Jeep Gladiator Sport 80th Anniversary  4WD  Snazzberry Pearlcoat  CARFAX One-Owner  LIFETIME ENGINE WARRANTY INCLUDED  Adventure-ready and anniversary-special, this 2021 Jeep Gladiator Sport 80th Anniversary Edition is more than just a rugged truckits a celebration of Jeep heritage, capability, and advanced tech. Finished in rare and eye-catching Snazzberry Pearlcoat with a Black interior, this 4D Crew Cab 4WD pickup is powered by the legendary 3.0L V6 EcoDiesel engine, delivering excellent torque and fuel efficiency. Matched with an 8-speed automatic transmission and a 3.73 rear axle ratio, its built for both towing and trail conquest. It gets an impressive 22 MPG city and 28 MPG highway while still providing off-road muscle and Jeep authenticity.  And the best part? It comes with a Lifetime Engine Warranty at no additional cost, exclusively from Tim Short  the home of lifetime warranties. With a clean CARFAX and one-owner history, youre not just getting a truck youre getting peace of mind and serious value.  This Gladiator 80th Anniversary Edition is packed with features that go far beyond standard. The black 3-piece hard top, body-color fender flares, and unique Jeep 80th Anniversary badging give it a distinct, premium presence. It also features Granite Crystal Aluminum wheels, LED taillamps, and gray/black Trail Rated and Jeep badges for extra flair.  Inside, the cabin offers a mix of durability and modern luxury with Cloth Bucket Seats featuring 80th Anniversary tags, Berber floor mats, anodized gunmetal interior bezels, and a leather-wrapped steering wheel. Stay connected and entertained with the 8.4" Uconnect 4C NAV Touchscreen Display, GPS Navigation, Apple CarPlay, Android Auto, HD Radio, and Alpine Premium Audio System. The 7" Driver Information Display keeps all vehicle vitals front and center.  Cold Weather Group adds heated front seats and a heated steering wheel perfect for year-round driving. The Convenience Group brings Universal Garage Door Opener, Remote Keyless Entry, and illuminated vanity mirrors, while the Safety Group adds Blind Spot & Cross Path Detection, ParkSense Rear Park Assist, Trailer Hitch Zoom, and more.  Towing and hauling are made easy with the Class IV Hitch Receiver, MOPAR Spray-In Bedliner, and the optional MOPAR Hard Tri-Fold Tonneau Cover (DISC). Whether you're working hard or playing harder, the Gladiator is built to deliver.  Highlighted features include:  3.0L EcoDiesel V6 with 8-Speed Automatic Transmission  4WD with Normal Duty Plus Suspension  8.4" Uconnect 4C NAV Display + Alpine Premium Audio  Apple CarPlay & Android Auto  Cold Weather Group (Heated Seats & Wheel)  Safety Group (Blind Spot, Rear Park Assist, Cross Path Detection)  GPS Navigation & Off-Road Info Pages  Black 3-Piece Hard Top  Class IV Tow Hitch & 400W Inverter  Remote Keyless Entry & Power Tailgate Lock  Power Heated Mirrors & Deep Tint Sunscreen Windows  Freedom Panel Storage Bag & Rear Sliding Window  This Gladiator is also equipped with SiriusXM Traffic Plus, Travel Link, Guardian Services, and a 5-year trial to advanced connected features. Its Jeep capability, diesel efficiency, and modern tech all in a package that's rare, special, and ready for anything.  At Tim Short Auto Group, were proud to serve communities across Kentucky, Ohio, and West Virginia, including Rowan County, Morehead, Grayson, Olive Hill, Ashland, Flemingsburg, Lexington, Winchester, Huntington WV, and many more. Were committed to helping you find the right vehicle with zero pressure and full transparency.  Open Monday through Friday from 9am to 7pm and Saturday 9am to 5pmcome in today and #LetsWorkTogether to get you behind the wheel of this stunning and capable 2021 Jeep Gladiator Sport 80th Anniversary. description: A modern classic, our one owner 2022 Chrysler 300 Touring Sedan with low miles makes a powerful impression in Bright White! Motivated by a 3.6 Liter Pentastar V6 that serves up 292hp tethered to an 8 Speed Automatic transmission so you can feel confident behind the wheel. You can also enjoy a smooth ride, thanks to a standard Touring suspension, and this Rear Wheel Drive sedan sees nearly 30mpg on the highway. Sleek and strong-looking, our 300 features bold exterior details like LED lighting, heated power mirrors, impressive alloy wheels, and an aggressive black grille.   Our Touring cabin takes care of you with top-notch amenities, including comfortable cloth seats, eight-way power for the driver, a leather-wrapped steering wheel, dual-zone automatic climate control, keyless access, pushbutton ignition, and cruise control. Uconnect® technology gives you control over rewarding features like an 8.4-inch touchscreen, Android Auto®, Apple CarPlay®, WiFi compatibility, Bluetooth®, and a six-speaker audio system. The full-size interior feels excellent when you want to stretch out, too!   You never know what comes next, but Chrysler helps you stay prepared with a rearview camera, stability/traction control, hill start assistance, tire pressure monitoring, ABS, advanced airbags, and more. It's no wonder our 300 Touring is in such high demand! Save this Page and Call for Availability. description: Discover the 2022 BMW X5 sDrive40i, equipped with the premium Parking Assistance Package. This exceptional SUV not only offers luxurious comfort but also boasts outstanding performance and advanced safety features, making it a top choice for discerning drivers.  Under the hood, the X5 sDrive40i is powered by a robust 3.0L I-6 gasoline engine, delivering an impressive 335 horsepower. Coupled with an 8-speed automatic transmission, this vehicle ensures a thrilling driving experience, whether youre navigating city streets or embarking on weekend getaways. The combination of power and efficiency enhances both performance and fuel economy, making it a smart investment for any driver.  Safety is a priority in the BMW X5, and it showcases cutting-edge technologies designed to protect both occupants and pedestrians. The **Forward Collision Mitigation** system continuously monitors your surroundings, ready to activate preventative measures when it senses an impending impact. This proactive approach helps reduce the severity of accidents, enhancing peace of mind during your travels. Additionally, the **Front Pedestrian Impact Prevention** technology ensures that pedestrians are detected and monitored, contributing to a safer driving experience.  The Parking Assistance Package elevates convenience to new heights. With multiple camerasincluding front, right side, left side, and rear-mounted optionsdrivers benefit from a 360-degree view of their surroundings. This comprehensive visibility is further enhanced by the **Drive Recorder** and **Surround View with 3D View aerial camera**, making parking and navigating tight spaces hassle-free.  Convenience features abound in the X5 sDrive40i. The **Power Open and Close Liftgate** simplifies access to the cargo area, making it a breeze to load and unload your belongings, especially when your hands are full. The **Voice Activated Integrated Navigation System** guides you effortlessly to your destination, eliminating the need for cumbersome maps and providing real-time directions at your command.  Comfort is paramount, with amenities like **Heated Driver and Front Passenger Seats** that offer immediate warmth in cold weather. The **Cruise Control** system, easily adjustable via the steering wheel, allows for a relaxed driving experience, maintaining your preferred speed with minimal effort and reducing driver fatigue on long journeys.  In summary, the 2022 BMW X5 sDrive40i with the Parking Assistance Package redefines luxury in SUVs. With its powerful performance, advanced safety features, and innovative technology, this SUV is designed to exceed expectations. Dont miss the chance to experience the ultimate driving machinevisit your local dealer and elevate your driving experience today!
